overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a futuristic neon-lit covered pedestrian arcade transitioning to an open urban plaza. The environment features heavy teal and magenta neon lighting, cyberpunk architecture, holographic advertisements, and moderate pedestrian density.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping arcade with teal neon ceiling panels

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian arcade, passing food stalls and neon-lit shops

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink shirt and white shorts walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: low concrete ceiling with embedded teal neon panel lights spanning the walkway
food vendor stall with red neon signage advertising burritos
illuminated wall sign for Broseph Brewing Company with white lettering
storefront with yellow neon signage reading 'EL DORADO PAWN SHOP'
large cylindrical structural column supporting the overhead walkway structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by teal neon ceiling panels. Various commercial establishments line the sides including a burrito stand and Broseph Brewing Company. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including a notable figure in a pink shirt ahead of the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic advertisements and pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: exiting the covered arcade through a wide opening into the open-air urban plaza
beginning to cross the striped pedestrian crosswalk in the open plaza

agents.ego_description: crossing the open pedestrian plaza surrounded by holographic billboards and futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle moving through the air traffic lanes above the street

entered.detail: massive floating holographic advertisement displaying 'DIET CHEMISTRY' with a woman's face
wide striped crosswalk with white painted lines across the plaza
tall palm trees lining the edge of the plaza
tall modern building with glass windows and neon signage in Japanese characters
elevated transparent tube walkway connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed arcade to a vast open plaza dominated by a massive holographic billboard advertising 'Diet Chemistry.' The camera crosses a striped pedestrian crosswalk while flying vehicles traverse the sky lanes above. Palm trees and futuristic glass architecture surround the area, with the teal interior lighting giving way to exterior neon illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit pedestrian arcade into a sprawling, open-air urban plaza. It begins by gliding through a covered walkway illuminated by teal ceiling panels, passing commercial storefronts like a burrito stand and Broseph Brewing Company while weaving through a crowd of pedestrians. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed architecture gives way to a vast exterior space, shifting the lighting from interior teal glows to the vibrant neon of the city. The scene then expands to reveal a massive holographic billboard for Diet Chemistry and futuristic glass buildings, crossing a striped pedestrian walkway as flying vehicles traverse the sky lanes above. Finally, the view opens fully to the plaza, framed by palm trees and the towering scale of the cyberpunk skyline.
